title: Mo' Villagers
description: This mod adds 5 new Villagers professions, The Lumber Jack, Nether Trader, Redstone Trader, Miner and The Florist
body:
Mo' Villagers is a Mod that adds new Professions to Villagers!

The Current Professions we have is:

Florist - Trades: Sells Vegetation Items/Blocks - Workstation: Flower Pot

Miner - Trades: Sells Items/Blocks you find Underground - Workstation: Furnace

Engineer- Trades: Sells Redstone Items/Blocks - Workstation: Target Block

Underworld Explorer- Trades: Sells Items/Blocks you find in the Nether - Workstation: Respawn Anchor

Lumber Jack- Trades: Sells Wooden Items/Blocks - Workstation: Crafting Table

You can currently find Houses in Villagers for all professions but the Underworld Explorer
